summary: Iteration 244 - D6 Profili Documentali per Committente Ricorrente Testing Complete. All backend APIs (18/18 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. The profile management system allows creating, editing, deleting profiles with document rules, applying profiles to commesse to create pre-populated packages, and saving existing packages as reusable profiles.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/profili-committente: Returns list of profiles with client_name, rules[], notes, warnings[], usage_count
POST /api/profili-committente: Creates profile with validation (empty client_name returns 400)
GET /api/profili-committente/{profile_id}: Returns single profile with all fields
PUT /api/profili-committente/{profile_id}: Updates allowed fields (client_name, description, rules, notes, warnings)
DELETE /api/profili-committente/{profile_id}: Deletes profile, returns 404 for non-existent
POST /api/profili-committente/da-pacchetto/{pack_id}: Creates profile from existing package items (semi-automatic)
POST /api/profili-committente/{profile_id}/applica: Creates new pacchetto_documentale with template_code='profilo:{profile_id}'
Applied pack items have correct structure (document_type_code, entity_type, status='pending')
Profile usage_count increments after apply, last_used_at is set
GET /api/profili-committente/suggest/{commessa_id}: Returns matching profile by client_name (or null)
Audit log entries created for profile CRUD operations (entity_type=profilo_committente)
Frontend: 3 tabs (Archivio, Pacchetti, Profili Committente) with correct data-testid attributes
Frontend: Profile cards show rules preview badges, notes, warnings, usage count
Frontend: 'Nuovo Profilo' button opens editor with rule management (add/remove/toggle required)
Frontend: 'Modifica' button opens pre-filled editor with existing profile data
Frontend: 'Elimina' button deletes profile (with browser confirmation)
Frontend: 'Applica a Commessa' button opens dialog with commessa selector
Frontend: 'Salva come Profilo' button in PackageDetailView header opens save dialog

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render correctly, dialogs work, buttons clickable)

seed_data_creation: Used existing user data with session_token K6fH_AIOSlUNVh8nGj5yAOjYtEyW-Ifsc4X5SFRVQYQ (user_97c773827822). Created test profiles with TEST_D6_ prefix during testing, cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: D6 Profili Committente is fully functional. Existing test profile prof_00bad461c118 (Impresa Edile Rossi S.r.l.) has 5 rules and usage_count >= 1. The /pacchetti-documentali page has 3 tabs. Profile CRUD, apply, and suggest endpoints all working. Audit logging for profile operations is active.
